rationale: Educ. Code §39.151 governs the commissioner's process for school district accountability rating challenges. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b); no conflict exists.
quote: The commissioner by rule shall provide a process for a school district or open-enrollment charter school to challenge an agency decision made under this chapter relating to an academic or financial accountability rating
_note: Rule text concerns accountability review process, not property tax exemptions. No overlap with proposed change.
